name: Chicken-And-Sausage Skewers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Boneless Skinless Chicken Breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 lb Mild Link Sausage, any kind
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, combine garlic, mustard, vinegar, oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Slowly whisk in the olive oil until well combined.
3. Place the chicken pieces in a large ziploc bag and pour the marinade over them. Seal the bag and shake to coat thoroughly. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or up to eight hours.
4. If using precooked sausage, cut into 3/4 inch pieces and refrigerate until ready to use. If using fresh sausage, poach in simmering water for 20 to 25 minutes or until cooked through. Remove from the water and let cool, then cut into 3/4 inch pieces and refrigerate until ready for use.
5. Prepare the grill by lighting it and allowing it to heat up.
6. On one skewer, thread a piece of chicken, followed by a piece of sausage (placed sideways through the skin), and repeat, ending with a piece of chicken, until you have four pieces of sausage and four pieces of chicken. Repeat with the remaining chicken and sausage.
7. Place the skewers on the grill and cook over medium heat for about six minutes per side or until cooked through.
8. Serve and enjoy.
Makes 6 servings
Per serving: 413 calories, 36g prot., 1g carb., 28g fat, 114mg chol., 8g sat. fat, 847mg sodium.
